title: cyperus pinetorum
intro: Cyperus pinetorum, also known as Pine Needle Sedge or Pinewood Sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cyperus pinetorum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
